reels.title: Start With The Real Hook
reels.openingLine: The strongest idea should start the reel.
reels.closingLine: That is where the payoff lands.

segments.quote: The strongest idea should start the reel.
segments.reason: Uses the strongest source line as the opening hook instead of conversational setup.

segments.quote: The context explains why the idea matters without adding filler.
segments.reason: Keeps the reel self-contained after the hook.

segments.quote: That is where the payoff lands.
segments.reason: Ends after the answer lands, not on an unresolved bridge.

notes: Backend fixture uses redacted source word IDs only.
The app validates word IDs and resolves exact timing locally.

reels.title: Trim The Setup First

segments.reason: Skips the conversational bridge and starts where the claim begins.
Stops before trailing explanation dilutes the ending.

notes: Needs trim because only part of the source window belongs in the reel.
